full_text:
Zhu Ling (Wenbo) 朱靈 (文博)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Ling (朱靈), styledWenbo (文博), was born in Qinghe. Said to be disliked by Cao Cao, his reputation was equal that of Xu Huang’s. Zhu Ling was affiliated with Yuan Shao and the Wei Kingdom.
